name: Ignacio Berroa
abstract: Ignacio Berroa (born July 8, 1953, in Havana, Cuba) is a jazz drummer. In 1980 Berroa left his country during the Mariel Boatlift, moved to New York and joined Dizzy Gillespie’s quartet in 1981, becoming the drummer of the band Gillespie formed until his death in 1993.

about_quotes.speaker: Luis Conte
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] I had a conversation with Ignacio Berroa and he talked about trying to pick up American radio... And I’m wondering about your experience.

about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] Because Ignacio Berroa, the drummer, actually left there on the Mariel boatlift... [INTERVIEWEE] Yup, that’s very true.
